title: clematis cirrhosa subsp. semitriloba
intro: Clematis cirrhosa subsp. semitriloba, also known as the evergreen clematis or alpine clematis, is a type of flowering plant in the Clematis genus. The medicinal properties of this plant include its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Clematis cirrhosa subsp. semitriloba are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of infections and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
